page_content:
B.S. Requirements

In addition to the University's general education requirements, students must earn a minimum of 36 credit hours within GVPT (and no more than 42 credit hours) total within the major. At least 18 of the 36 credits must be in upper-level courses. Students who have completed or are in the process of completing 42 credits must get permission to take additional GVPT credits. A course used to fulﬁll one requirement for the major may not count towards any other International Relations major requirement. A minimum grade of "C-" is required in all major requirements.
